title: RegistryEntry
description: Control plane's served record for a registered hexagon (D014) — a descriptor summary plus changing state. Populated from a repo's hexagon.descriptor frontmatter plus git/CI-sourced state.

status.description: `suspended` exists only here — a registry action, not a repo property.

version.description: Git tag where one exists, else version+shortsha.

appId.description: App-only. Populated when app.manifest registration arrives.

class.description: App-only. D010 risk class tier, populated when app.manifest registration arrives.

plan.description: App-only. Populated when app.manifest registration arrives; enum aligned with app.manifest's plan field.
